executionNotes: Cases CFG-E2E-001 through CFG-E2E-046 require admin product creation as preconditions (multi-step admin UI workflow). These are SKIPPED as they depend on sequentially creating test products. Cases CFG-E2E-047 through CFG-E2E-057 use existing products (CFG-009 Bike, CFG-001 Hat) but were deprioritized in favor of the VCST-4713 critical cases. Cases CFG-VAR-019 and CFG-VAR-020 require REST API product creation with Variation sections. All 3 VCST-4713 conditional cases were attempted.

CFG-E2E-058-COND.notes: PDP showed price $345.00 with Aluminum+Standard+Slick selected. Tire Type section correctly appeared when Wheel Set=Standard was selected. However, the AddItem mutation payload submitted only Section A (Frame Type=Aluminum). CreateConfiguredLineItem mutations showed progressive section additions (A, A+B, A+B+C), but the final AddItem sent only A. Root cause: JS-based radio selection via evaluate() did not properly trigger Vue reactivity for the storefront composable; the selections were visible in the DOM but not registered in the Vue state that drives the Add to Cart payload. This test needs re-execution with purely Playwright-native click actions on snapshot refs. The CONDITIONAL SECTION VISIBILITY logic itself works correctly.

CFG-E2E-059-COND.notes: Added to cart WITHOUT touching Wheel Set. Aluminum preselected ($0). Price $300.00 confirmed. AddItem mutation payload contained ONLY Section A (Frame Type). Tire Type was NOT in DOM (dependsOn Wheel Set which had no value). configurationItems correctly excluded Section C (Tire Type id=12fbadbf-b1e8-496e-9576-18b929a654a8). Cart line item showed $300.00 with only AGENT-TEST-Cond-Frame-Aluminum-20260413 component.

CFG-E2E-060-COND.notes: Depends on CFG-E2E-058-COND completing successfully (requires a cart line item with Aluminum+Standard+Slick configuration to reconfigure). Since 058 was inconclusive and the cart item only had Section A, this test could not be executed as designed.

skippedReasons.CFG-E2E-001_to_046: Require admin product creation as preconditions (multi-step admin UI workflow not automatable in this session)
skippedReasons.CFG-E2E-047_to_057: Use existing products but deprioritized for VCST-4713 critical cases; time constraint
skippedReasons.CFG-VAR-019_020: Require REST API product creation with Variation sections
skippedReasons.CFG-E2E-060-COND: Depends on CFG-E2E-058-COND prerequisite not met
